TCGA BRCA HER2+ - Data Import and Exploration

Charlie Whittaker

4/10/26

Load Libraries

library(openxlsx)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggrepel)
library(ggpubr)
library(XML)
library(reprex)
library(matrixStats)
library(readxl)

library(Seurat)
library(SeuratWrappers)
#library(Azimuth)
library(patchwork)
library(sctransform)
library(SingleR)
library(rtracklayer)
library(apeglm)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(gprofiler2)
library(cluster)
library(fgsea)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(UCell)
library(GSVA)
library(GSEABase)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(grid)

#library(SoupX)
#library(DoubletFinder)

Load Local Code

source('../../Rcode/data_formatting_tools.R')
source('../../Rcode/analysis_tools.R')
source('../../Rcode/plots.R')
source('../../Rcode/common.R')
source('../../Rcode/ssGSEA.Library.R')

Import BRCA expression matrix data

expr_matrix <- readRDS("expr_matrix.rds")

Import George’s triple-negative list

gb.tnbc <- read.delim("TNBC_from_TCGA.matrix.v2_EMT_KS.txt")
gb.tnbc <- gb.tnbc %>% dplyr::rename(TNBC_Sample = V1)

Subset expr_matrix to gb.tnbc samples

expr_matrix.df <- as.data.frame(expr_matrix)

missing_samples <- gb.tnbc$TNBC_Sample[!gb.tnbc$TNBC_Sample %in% colnames(expr_matrix.df)]
head(missing_samples)
[1] "TCGA.A7.A0CE.01A.11R.A00Z.07" "TCGA.BH.A0B3.01A.11R.A056.07" "TCGA.BH.A0BW.01A.11R.A115.07" "TCGA.BH.A0E0.01A.11R.A056.07"
[5] "TCGA.BH.A18V.01A.11R.A12D.07" "TCGA.BH.A1F0.01A.11R.A137.07"
length(missing_samples)
[1] 13
expr_matrix.tnbc <- expr_matrix.df %>% dplyr::select(any_of(gb.tnbc$TNBC_Sample))

expr_matrix.tnbc <- as.matrix(expr_matrix.tnbc)

Subset full data matrix to HER2+ based on expression of ERBB2

This group of samples can be defined using expression of ERBB2

Examine expression of ERBB2

# Extract ERBB2 expression values across all samples
erbb2_values <- expr_matrix["ERBB2", ]

# Calculate threshold
threshold <- quantile(erbb2_values, 0.75)
her2_positive_samples <- names(erbb2_values[erbb2_values > threshold])

data.frame(ERBB2 = erbb2_values) %>%
  mutate(group = ifelse(ERBB2 > threshold, "HER2+", "HER2-")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = ERBB2, fill = group)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, color = "black", alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("HER2-" = "steelblue", "HER2+" = "green")) +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = threshold), color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "ERBB2 Expression Distribution in BRCA Samples",
       x = "ERBB2 Expression (log2 + 1)",
       y = "Number of Samples",
       fill = "Sample Type")


# Summary
cat(sprintf("HER2+ samples identified: %d / %d total (%.1f%%)\n", 
            length(her2_positive_samples), length(erbb2_values),
            100*length(her2_positive_samples)/length(erbb2_values)))
HER2+ samples identified: 274 / 1095 total (25.0%)
cat(sprintf("Threshold: %.3f\n", threshold))
Threshold: 13.360

Examine expression of ERBB2 in George’s tnbc set

# Extract ERBB2 expression values across all samples
erbb2_values.gb <- expr_matrix.tnbc["ERBB2", ]

# use threshold from full dataset analysis
threshold.gb <- 13.36
her2_positive_samples.gb <- names(erbb2_values.gb[erbb2_values.gb > threshold.gb])

data.frame(ERBB2 = erbb2_values.gb) %>%
  mutate(group = ifelse(ERBB2 > threshold.gb, "HER2+", "HER2-")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = ERBB2, fill = group)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, color = "black", alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("HER2-" = "steelblue", "HER2+" = "green")) +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = threshold.gb), color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "ERBB2 Expression Distribution in gb tnbc BRCA Samples",
       x = "ERBB2 Expression (log2 + 1)",
       y = "Number of Samples",
       fill = "Sample Type")


# Summary
cat(sprintf("HER2+ samples identified: %d / %d total (%.1f%%)\n", 
            length(her2_positive_samples.gb), length(erbb2_values.gb),
            100*length(her2_positive_samples.gb)/length(erbb2_values.gb)))
HER2+ samples identified: 7 / 179 total (3.9%)
cat(sprintf("Threshold: %.3f\n", threshold.gb))
Threshold: 13.360

Subset expr_matrix to HER2+ samples

cat("\nBEFORE subsetting:\n")

BEFORE subsetting:
pre_dims <- dim(expr_matrix)
cat(sprintf("  Genes (rows):    %d\n", pre_dims[1]))
  Genes (rows):    20501
cat(sprintf("  Samples (cols):  %d\n", pre_dims[2]))
  Samples (cols):  1095
# Perform subsetting
expr_matrix <- expr_matrix[, her2_positive_samples]

# Print post-subsetting dimensions
cat("\nAFTER subsetting to HER2+ samples:\n")

AFTER subsetting to HER2+ samples:
post_dims <- dim(expr_matrix)
cat(sprintf("  Genes (rows):    %d\n", post_dims[1]))
  Genes (rows):    20501
cat(sprintf("  Samples (cols):  %d\n", post_dims[2]))
  Samples (cols):  274

Row-center and transpose the gene expression data for use later

# Remove genes with zero variance BEFORE scaling
gene_sds <- apply(expr_matrix, 1, sd)
expr_matrix.filtered <- expr_matrix[gene_sds > 0, ]

cat("Genes removed (zero variance):", nrow(expr_matrix) - nrow(expr_matrix), "\n")
Genes removed (zero variance): 0 
cat("Genes remaining:", nrow(expr_matrix), "\n")
Genes remaining: 20501 
# Now row-center
expr_matrix.rc <- calculate_zscore(expr_matrix.filtered)

# Verify - should have NO NaN
print(sum(is.nan(expr_matrix.rc)))
[1] 0
expr_matrix.rc.transposed <- t(expr_matrix.rc)

Gene Sets

Ferroptosis <- c("CBS","PRNP","MAP1LC3B","SLC7A11","ACSL6","SAT2","TF","SLC11A2","CP","FTL","LPCAT3","ATG7","CTH",
                 "CYBB","AKR1C1","AKR1C2","DPP4","ACSL1","ACSL3","ACSL4","FDFT1","SLC39A14","ALOX15","FTH1","GCH1",
                 "NOX1","COQ2","GCLC","GCLM","GPX4","GSS","SLC40A1","HMGCR","HMOX1","HSPB1","IREB2","MAP1LC3C",
                 "NOX4","PCBP1","PCBP2","CHMP5","ACSL5","PHKG2","POR","STEAP3","CISD1","BACH1","SAT1","SLC39A8",
                 "SLC1A5","SLC3A2","TFRC","TP53","TXNRD1","VDAC2","VDAC3","CHMP6","NCOA4","SLC38A1","MAP1LC3A",
                 "AIFM2","AKR1C3","FTMT","ATG5")

                 "STEAP4","TF","TFR2","TFRC","SLC39A8","SLC39A14")

Iron_efflux <- c("CP","SLC40A1","HAMP","FLVCR1","HEPH")

Fatty_acid <- c("ACAA1","ACAA2","ACACA","ACACB","ACAD10","ACAD11","ACAD8","ACAD9","ACADL","ACADM","ACADS","ACADSB","ACADVL","ACAT1",
        "ACAT2","ACBD3","ACBD4","ACBD5","ACBD6","ACBD7","ACOX1","ACOX2","ACOX3","ACOXL","ACSBG1","ACSBG2","ACSF2","ACSF3",

        "MLYCD","MTTP","OLAH","OXSM","PECI","PECR","PHYH","PHYHD1","PNLIP","PNLIPRP1","PNLIPRP2","PNLIPRP3","PNPLA1",

# EMT and Others

EMT.Klughammer <- c("IGFBP7","SPARC","COL1A2","COL4A1","COL3A1","BGN","ACTA2","FN1","COL4A2","TAGLN",
                    "DCN","COL1A1","LUM","COL6A3","POSTN","AEBP1","COL6A2","VIM","TIMP1","TPM2","COL5A1",

EMT.cell_line.epi <- c("CDH1","AGR2","EPCAM","KRT19","RAB25","TACSTD2","S100P","CEACAM6","GALNT3","FXYD3","SPINT2",
                       "TMEM30B","SCNN1A","ST14","ESRP1","S100A14","CLDN7","ERBB3","RBM47","SPINT1","ELF3","CLDN4",
                       "PRSS8","SH3YL1","EHF","LCN2","JUP","VAMP8","KRT8","C1orf106","KRT7","DSP","CDS1","ITGB4",
                       "TMPRSS4","LSR","SORL1","GRHL2","PPL","C1orf116","TSPAN1","MAP7","SLPI","TOX3","ARHGAP8","F11R",
                       "LAD1","GPX2","CTSH","GPR56","FA2H","KLF5","AREG","KRT18","SCEL","CDH3","UGT1A1","MPZL2","AIM1",

                       "COMT","ANXA4","TNFSF13","OCLN","SLC9A3R1","XBP1")

EMT.cell_line.mes <- c("VIM","ZEB1","EMP3","SACS","AXL","LOXL2","SPARC","FHL1","FERMT2","TUBA1A","TMEM158","CALD1",
                       "LGALS1","PMP22","MSN","GLYR1","MAP1B","AP1S2","GJA1","DENND5A","C12orf24","TPM2","TUBB6",
                       "SRPX","ANK2","CHN1","SH2B3","LEPRE1","ETV1","SOBP","AKAP12","TGFB1I1","SERPINE1","SOAT1",
                       "COL5A2","LHFP","CEP170","POPDC3","TRPC1","KDELC1","MYL9","BAG2","FSTL1","MXRA7","GFPT2",
                       "RECK","TMEFF1","PTRF")

EMT.tumor.epi <- c("KRT19","AGR2","RAB25","CDH1","ERBB3","FXYD3","SLC44A4","S100P","SCNN1A","GALNT3","PRSS8","ELF3",
                   "CEACAM6","TMPRSS4","CLDN7","TACSTD2","CLDN3","EPCAM","SPINT1","TSPAN1","PLS1","TMEM30B","PRR15L",

                   "EHF","AP1M2","CEACAM5","LAD1","ARHGAP8","TFF3","JUP","CD24","TMC5","MLPH","ELMO3","ERBB2","LLGL2",

                   "ABHD11","EPS8L2","MYO6","TSPAN8","MST1R","SLC16A5","GPR56","AZGP1","TOB1","SLC35A3","TRPM4",

EMT.tumor.mes <- c("GAS1","CXCL12","ZEB1","GLYR1","FHL1","FERMT2","C1S","FYN","WIPF1","CYP1B1","SERPING1","SERPINF1",
                   "VCAM1","MAP1B","TCF4","SRPX","EMP3","DPT","CALD1","PTGIS","VIM","CD163","C1R","FBN1","FN1","FXYD6",

                   "SAMSN1","TPM2","ASPN","COL6A1","IGFBP5","MOXD1","AKAP2","SLC2A3","OLFML2B","ANGPTL2","PCOLCE",
                   "COLEC12","CTSK","TAGLN","CDH2","IL10RA","C1orf54","CEP170","TNS1","CLEC2B","JAM3","SEPT6","GREM1",

                   "NUAK1","WWTR1","FBLN1","MPDZ","SYNE1","EFEMP2","GIMAP6","KIAA1462","CCL8","COL15A1","CHN1","CRISPLD2",

LAM <- c("TREM2","APOE","C1Q2A","C1QB","C1QC","CD9","CD163")

exhausted.CD8 <- c("PDCD1","CTLA4","LAG3","HAVCR2","TIGIT","TOX","EOMES","TBX21","CXCL13","CD244")

Score gene sets for heatmap using gsva

the heatmap contains the following gene sets:

Gene list pathway type Fatty acid uptake Ferroptosis promotion LOXs Ferroptosis promotion Iron intake WHv1 Ferroptosis promotion Iron utilization Ferroptosis promotion Glutathione Ferroptosis suppression BH4 Ferroptosis suppression CoQ10 Ferroptosis suppression ACSL4 Gene AGPS Gene FAR1 Gene

gsva_params <- gsvaParam(exprData = expr_matrix, 
                         geneSets = list(
                           Fatty_acid_uptake.gsva = Fatty_acid_uptake,
                           LOXs.gsva = LOXs,
                           Thioredoxin.gsva = Thioredoxin,
                           Glutamate_transmembrane.gsva = Glutamate_transmembrane,
                           Membrane_Lipid.gsva = Membrane_Lipid,
                           Unsat_FA_biosynth_process.gsva = Unsaturated_FA_biosynthetic_process,
                           Fatty_acid.gsva = Fatty_acid,
                           Iron_intake.gsva = Iron_intake,
                           Iron_utilization.gsva = Iron_utilization,
                           Glutathione.gsva = Glutathione,
                           BH4.gsva = BH4,
                           CoQ10.gsva = CoQ10
                         ))

Heatmap.GSVA.scores <- gsva(gsva_params)

Transpose gsva scores

Heatmap.GSVA.scores.transposed <- t(Heatmap.GSVA.scores)

EMT scoring with Chakraborty KS methd

Import KS code

source("../../emt_code/Chakraborty_et_al_KS_code_vCAW.R")

Point to signature file

KSScore.EMTSignature.file = "../../emt_code/EM_gene_signature_tumor_KS.xlsx"

Calculate KS

tcga.ks.emt <- KSScore(expr_matrix,"tcga",".")
tcga.ks.emt <- as.data.frame(tcga.ks.emt)

Combine data for plotting

# Convert all to dataframes with rownames as column
gsva_df <- as.data.frame(Heatmap.GSVA.scores.transposed) %>% 
  rownames_to_column("Sample")
expr_df <- as.data.frame(expr_matrix.rc.transposed) %>% 
  rownames_to_column("Sample")
tcga_df <- as.data.frame(tcga.ks.emt) %>% 
  rownames_to_column("Sample")

# Join all three by Sample
merged_all <- gsva_df %>%
  inner_join(expr_df, by = "Sample") %>%
  inner_join(tcga_df, by = "Sample")

# Convert Sample back to rownames
rownames(merged_all) <- merged_all$Sample
merged_all <- merged_all %>% dplyr::select(-Sample)

# Report on join success
cat("=== THREE-WAY JOIN REPORT ===\n\n")
=== THREE-WAY JOIN REPORT ===
cat("Rows in GSVA scores:                  ", nrow(gsva_df), "\n")
Rows in GSVA scores:                   274 
cat("Rows in expression matrix:            ", nrow(expr_df), "\n")
Rows in expression matrix:             274 
cat("Rows in tcga.ks.emt:                ", nrow(tcga_df), "\n")
Rows in tcga.ks.emt:                 274 
cat("Rows after inner_join:                ", nrow(merged_all), "\n\n")
Rows after inner_join:                 274 
# Check for unmatched
unmatched_gsva <- anti_join(gsva_df, expr_df, by = "Sample") %>% 
  anti_join(tcga_df, by = "Sample")
unmatched_expr <- anti_join(expr_df, gsva_df, by = "Sample") %>% 
  anti_join(tcga_df, by = "Sample")
unmatched_tcga <- anti_join(tcga_df, gsva_df, by = "Sample") %>% 
  anti_join(expr_df, by = "Sample")

cat("Samples in GSVA but NOT in others:    ", nrow(unmatched_gsva), "\n")
Samples in GSVA but NOT in others:     0 
cat("Samples in expr but NOT in others:    ", nrow(unmatched_expr), "\n")
Samples in expr but NOT in others:     0 
cat("Samples in tcga but NOT in others:     ", nrow(unmatched_tcga), "\n\n")
Samples in tcga but NOT in others:      0 
# Success status
if (nrow(merged_all) > 0) {
  cat("✓ SUCCESS: Join completed!\n")
  cat("  Final dimensions: ", nrow(merged_all), " samples × ", ncol(merged_all), " variables\n\n")
} else {
  cat("✗ ERROR: No matching samples found!\n")
}
✓ SUCCESS: Join completed!
  Final dimensions:  274  samples ×  20104  variables
# View result
cat("Final structure:\n")
Final structure:
print(head(merged_all[, 1:8]))
                             Fatty_acid_uptake.gsva   LOXs.gsva Thioredoxin.gsva Glutamate_transmembrane.gsva Membrane_Lipid.gsva
TCGA.3C.AALI.01A.11R.A41B.07             -0.3514711  0.13839311      -0.28290724                  0.073616203         -0.01026525
TCGA.3C.AALJ.01A.31R.A41B.07              0.5108534 -0.56817352       0.07401816                 -0.089039030         -0.12685524
TCGA.3C.AALK.01A.11R.A41B.07             -0.5787706 -0.04416791      -0.21862702                 -0.009927928         -0.03560228
TCGA.4H.AAAK.01A.12R.A41B.07              0.1973604 -0.12065717       0.03298886                 -0.247691539         -0.22948964
TCGA.5L.AAT1.01A.12R.A41B.07             -0.3981405  0.42104470      -0.12252169                 -0.112363684         -0.08607309
TCGA.5T.A9QA.01A.11R.A41B.07             -0.6157559 -0.38772261      -0.09072434                 -0.241532997         -0.21177141
                             Unsat_FA_biosynth_process.gsva Fatty_acid.gsva Iron_intake.gsva
TCGA.3C.AALI.01A.11R.A41B.07                    -0.22162632     -0.14775258       -0.3286311
TCGA.3C.AALJ.01A.31R.A41B.07                    -0.20137537     -0.28677654       -0.5299979
TCGA.3C.AALK.01A.11R.A41B.07                    -0.02445373     -0.11937801       -0.4980388
TCGA.4H.AAAK.01A.12R.A41B.07                    -0.26321182     -0.09486943       -0.2735462
TCGA.5L.AAT1.01A.12R.A41B.07                    -0.01710252     -0.08455405       -0.3812909
TCGA.5T.A9QA.01A.11R.A41B.07                    -0.34179743      0.09200475       -0.3986830

Gene set scatter plots

# Helper function to get correlation statistics
get_cor_stats <- function(x, y) {
  # Remove NA values
  idx <- !is.na(x) & !is.na(y)
  x <- x[idx]
  y <- y[idx]
  
  # Calculate correlation
  cor_test <- cor.test(x, y, method = "pearson")
  r_squared <- cor_test$estimate^2
  p_value <- cor_test$p.value
  
  return(list(r_squared = r_squared, p_value = p_value))
}

# Plot 1: BH4.gsva
stats1 <- get_cor_stats(merged_all$tcga.ks.emt, merged_all$BH4.gsva)
title1 <- sprintf("Scatterplot of Her2+ tcga.ks.emt vs BH4.gsva - (R² = %.2f, p = %.2e)", 
                  stats1$r_squared, stats1$p_value)

BH4.scatter <- ggplot(merged_all, aes(x = tcga.ks.emt, y = BH4.gsva)) +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue", size = 2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "red", fill = "red", alpha = 0.2) +
  labs(
    title = title1,
    x = "tcga.ks.emt",
    y = "BH4 gsva"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
BH4.scatter

pdf("bh4_scatter.pdf", width = 6, height = 7)
BH4.scatter
dev.off()
png 
  2 

# Plot 2: ACSL4
stats2 <- get_cor_stats(merged_all$tcga.ks.emt, merged_all$ACSL4)
title2 <- sprintf("Scatterplot of Her2+ tcga.ks.emt vs ACSL4 - (R² = %.2f, p = %.2e)", 
                  stats2$r_squared, stats2$p_value)

ggplot(merged_all, aes(x = tcga.ks.emt, y = ACSL4)) +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue", size = 2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "red", fill = "red", alpha = 0.2) +
  labs(
    title = title2,
    x = "tcga.ks.emt",
    y = "ACSL4 (Z-Score)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


# Plot 3: GCH1
stats3 <- get_cor_stats(merged_all$tcga.ks.emt, merged_all$GCH1)
title3 <- sprintf("Scatterplot of Her2+ tcga.ks.emt vs GCH1 - (R² = %.2f, p = %.2e)", 
                  stats3$r_squared, stats3$p_value)

ggplot(merged_all, aes(x = tcga.ks.emt, y = GCH1)) +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue", size = 2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "red", fill = "red", alpha = 0.2) +
  labs(
    title = title3,
    x = "tcga.ks.emt",
    y = "GCH1 (Z-Score)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

Prepare Heatmap - version 2 only from original

merged_all.df <- merged_all %>% rownames_to_column("Sample")

heat.data <- merged_all.df %>% 
  dplyr::select(all_of(c("Sample",
                         "tcga.ks.emt",
                         "Fatty_acid_uptake.gsva","Iron_intake.gsva", "Membrane_Lipid.gsva", "Unsat_FA_biosynth_process.gsva", "Fatty_acid.gsva",
                         "Iron_utilization.gsva", "Glutathione.gsva", 
                         "BH4.gsva", "Thioredoxin.gsva","Glutamate_transmembrane.gsva")))
# Sort by EMT_KS_Score
heat.data.sorted <- heat.data[order(heat.data$tcga.ks.emt), ]

# Define genes in order
genes_to_plot <- c("tcga.ks.emt",
                   "Fatty_acid_uptake.gsva", "Unsat_FA_biosynth_process.gsva", "Fatty_acid.gsva", "Membrane_Lipid.gsva", "Iron_intake.gsva", "Iron_utilization.gsva",
                   "BH4.gsva","Thioredoxin.gsva","Glutathione.gsva","Glutamate_transmembrane.gsva")

# Create matrix
heatmap_data <- as.matrix(heat.data.sorted[, genes_to_plot])
heatmap_data <- t(heatmap_data)

# Define groups
group_vec <- c("SortOrder",
               "Ferroptosis promotion", "Ferroptosis promotion", "Ferroptosis promotion","Ferroptosis promotion","Ferroptosis promotion","Ferroptosis promotion",
               "Ferroptosis suppression", "Ferroptosis suppression","Ferroptosis suppression", "Ferroptosis suppression")

# Create row split factor for spacing
row_split <- factor(group_vec, 
                    levels = c("SortOrder", 
                               "Ferroptosis promotion",
                               "Ferroptosis suppression"))

# Create color functions
# Row 1: SortOrder
# Rows 2-11: Ferroptosis (12 rows)
ferroptosis_data <- heatmap_data[2:11, ]
sortorder_data <- heatmap_data[1, ]

# Ferroptosis color scale
ferroptosis_cols <- colorRamp2(c(min(ferroptosis_data), 0, max(ferroptosis_data)), 
                                c("blue", "white", "red"))

# SortOrder color scale: orange to green
sortorder_cols <- colorRamp2(c(min(sortorder_data), max(sortorder_data)), 
                              c("darkorange", "lightgreen"))

# Create heatmap WITH left annotation for group bars
ht <- Heatmap(heatmap_data,
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        row_split = row_split,
        row_gap = unit(3, "mm"),
        row_names_side = "right",
        show_column_names = FALSE,
        show_heatmap_legend = FALSE,
        left_annotation = rowAnnotation(
          Group = group_vec,
          col = list(Group = c("SortOrder" = "darkgreen",
                               "Ferroptosis promotion" = "steelblue",
                               "Ferroptosis suppression" = "coral")),
          show_legend = FALSE,
          simple_anno_size = unit(0.8, "cm"),
          gp = gpar(fontsize = 9)
        ),
        cell_fun = function(j, i, x, y, w, h, fill) {
          if(i == 1) {
            # SortOrder row
            fill_color <- sortorder_cols(heatmap_data[i, j])
          } else if(i <= 11) {
            # Ferroptosis rows
            fill_color <- ferroptosis_cols(heatmap_data[i, j])
          }
          grid.rect(x, y, w, h, gp = gpar(fill = fill_color, col = NA))
        },
        rect_gp = gpar(type = "none"),
        name = "Value",
        width = ncol(heatmap_data)*unit(0.8, "mm"),
        height = nrow(heatmap_data)*unit(9, "mm"))

# Create separate legends
group_legend <- Legend(at = c("SortOrder", "Ferroptosis promotion", 
                              "Ferroptosis suppression"),
                       labels = c("SortOrder", "Ferroptosis promotion", 
                                  "Ferroptosis suppression"),
                       legend_gp = gpar(fill = c("darkgreen", "steelblue", "coral")),
                       title = "Group Category")

ferroptosis_legend <- Legend(col_fun = ferroptosis_cols,
                             title = "GSVA Scores",
                             direction = "vertical")

sortorder_legend <- Legend(col_fun = sortorder_cols,
                           title = "Sort Order\n(EMT_KS_Score)",
                           direction = "vertical")

# Step 8: Draw with legends
pdf("heatmap_HER2plus_v2.pdf", width = 12, height = 7)
draw(ht, 
     annotation_legend_list = list(group_legend, sortorder_legend, ferroptosis_legend),
     annotation_legend_side = "right",
     padding = unit(c(1, 1, 1, 1), "cm"))
dev.off()

# Or view in RStudio
draw(ht, 
     annotation_legend_list = list(group_legend, sortorder_legend, ferroptosis_legend),
     annotation_legend_side = "right",
     padding = unit(c(1, 1, 1, 1), "cm"))

write session info

Capturing information about the R session helps document your work

sessionInfo()
writeLines(capture.output(sessionInfo()), "02_TCGA_BRCA_HER2plus_sessionInfo.txt")
